---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem would this solve?**
Describe the situation where you miss this feature.

**Proposed behavior**
What should happen, in Sortflow's terms (nodes, rules, review tray, Files page…).

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways you've worked around it, if any.

**Safety note**
Sortflow never permanently deletes or overwrites files — proposals should fit
that model (journaled, reviewable, undoable).
